requests.title: ETCH-03 resist top-up + seal kits before Tuesday PM
requests.description: Ops note came in rushed from Fab Line 3. Prefer JSR material if available. ETCH-03 preventive maintenance window is Tuesday night and the chamber cannot restart if the resist top-up and seal kits miss the window.
requested_items: need 1 krf photoresist for line 3 hold by Tue night
2 seal kits for etch chamber pm on etch-03

clarifications.question: What is the production or maintenance impact if the photoresist and seal kits are not on site before the ETCH-03 window?
What delivery date is required to support the ETCH-03 maintenance plan and avoid a line restart delay?

audit_events.detail: Messy intake captured for ETCH-03 resist top-up and chamber seal kits from Fab Operations.
Question: What is the production or maintenance impact if the photoresist and seal kits are not on site before the ETCH-03 window?
Question: What delivery date is required to support the ETCH-03 maintenance plan and avoid a line restart delay?
